scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && pnpm --filter @rmr/api build
scripts.render:build:api: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @rmr/db exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm build:api
scripts.render:build:worker: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @rmr/db exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter @rmr/worker build
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && pnpm --filter @rmr/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @rmr/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter web build
